inputs.shares_source: Unresolved. Aggregators cite ~3.46M shares (implies ~$1.99B mcap and impossible ~$157M cash dividend at $45.40/sh). Form 990 FY2024 NI only $5.3M. [HUMAN REVIEW]
inputs.dividend_source: Yahoo Finance indicated dividend / yield ~8% [HUMAN REVIEW — confirm cash actually paid]
inputs.form990_source: ProPublica Nonprofit Explorer EIN 11-1190044 FY ending Dec 2024 extracted data (PDF not yet local)
inputs.normalization_note: IRR pending verified share count and Form 990 PDF. Economic case is cemetery land/operations vs OTC quote.

optionality_gate.notes: Net assets $162M are an accounting floor for the nonprofit entity, not a proven per-share NAV until share count and equity claims are verified.

nav_overlay.notes: Liabilities reported $0 on extract; verify Schedule D land/building marks. PDF required.

option_scan.question: GAAP/990 book misstates land?
option_scan.evidence: Long Island cemetery land often carried below market; Schedule D needed

option_scan.question: Market structure discount?
option_scan.evidence: OTC Pink, tiny volume, no SEC 10-K

stance_proposal.override_reason: IRR pending verified share count and local Form 990 PDF

notes: Verify shares outstanding and whether $45.40 dividend is real cash per share
Reconcile aggregator ~3.46M shares vs dividend cash math

valuation_methodology.decision_rule: Component schedule is provisional until share count and Form 990 PDFs are verified. Per-share figures use aggregator ~3.46M shares and are evidence-blocked for investment sizing.

component_valuation.coverage_statement: Provisional schedule only. Share count conflict is an evidence blocker for IRR and position sizing; components inventory the economic claims that must be reconciled.

valuation.evidence: Form 990 FY2024 extract (EIN 11-1190044); proof base 46.7929/sh via net_asset_value@1.0 (PLWN/research/evidence/form990_fy2024_extract.json). Share count remains [HUMAN REVIEW].
valuation.assumption_summary: 990 net assets as reference floor for the nonprofit entity, not proven liquidation NAV.
valuation.cross_check: Range must reconcile to primary filings and realization path before IC approval.
valuation.falsifier: Verified share count or Schedule D shows net assets per economic unit far from this band.

source.locator: financials.net_assets = 161,903,602

assumptions.label: Provisional economic units outstanding (OTC aggregator; unverified)
assumptions.rationale: Low case uses fewer assets per share via higher share count; high case uses lower share count. Base matches aggregator ~3.46M pending Form 990 governance disclosure.

valuation.evidence: Form 990 FY2024 extract (EIN 11-1190044); proof base 11.9909/sh via owner_cash_or_dividend_discount@1.0 (PLWN/research/evidence/form990_fy2024_extract.json). Share count remains [HUMAN REVIEW].
valuation.assumption_summary: Modest capitalization of cemetery cash earnings; land value is separate.
valuation.cross_check: Range must reconcile to primary filings and realization path before IC approval.
valuation.falsifier: Operations cannot sustain distributions anywhere near the indicated $45.40 dividend under the provisional share count.

source.locator: financials.net_income = 5,324,496

assumptions.label: Seven-year cemetery owner-cash capitalization multiple
assumptions.rationale: Bear assumes trough earnings and nonprofit reinvestment drag; base modestly capitalizes through-cycle cemetery cash separate from land; bull assumes durable pricing power on Long Island inventory.

calculations.label: FY2024 net income per provisional share

valuation.evidence: Form 990 FY2024 extract (EIN 11-1190044); proof base 15.0/sh via risk_adjusted_milestone_value@1.0 (PLWN/research/evidence/form990_fy2024_extract.json). Share count remains [HUMAN REVIEW].
valuation.assumption_summary: Option on land mark-up; not double-counted inside form990_net_assets.
valuation.cross_check: Range must reconcile to primary filings and realization path before IC approval.
valuation.falsifier: Schedule D / appraisal shows no material gap above 990 carrying value.

inputs.label: Provisional economic units outstanding (OTC aggregator; unverified)

source.locator: notes: aggregator ~3.46M shares provisional; conflicts with dividend cash math

assumptions.label: Risk-adjusted land fair-value uplift above 990 carrying amounts
assumptions.rationale: Long Island cemetery land may carry below market on Form 990 Schedule D; base assigns modest risked uplift; high case is appraisal upside pending local PDF.

assumptions.label: Probability land mark-up is economically accessible to minority OTC holders
assumptions.rationale: Low case zeroes option until Schedule D / appraisal evidence; base/high apply full modeled uplift.

valuation.evidence: Form 990 FY2024 extract (EIN 11-1190044); proof base -20.0/sh via net_asset_value@1.0 (PLWN/research/evidence/form990_fy2024_extract.json). Share count remains [HUMAN REVIEW].
valuation.assumption_summary: Large reserve until share count and dividend cash facts are verified.
valuation.cross_check: Range must reconcile to primary filings and realization path before IC approval.
valuation.falsifier: Verified float and governance show minority common can realize NAV without the haircut.

inputs.label: Provisional economic units outstanding (OTC aggregator; unverified)

source.locator: notes: aggregator ~3.46M shares provisional; conflicts with dividend cash math

assumptions.label: OTC illiquidity, 501(c)(13) governance, and share-count conflict reserve
assumptions.rationale: Thin OTC Pink market, nonprofit distribution constraints, and unresolved share count that makes a $45.40 indicated dividend implausible versus $5.3M FY2024 net income.

calculations.label: Illiquidity and governance reserve per share

economic_value.accounting_reference: Form 990 FY2024 extract via ProPublica (PDF pending). Not SEC GAAP.

economic_claim.description: One provisional Pinelawn Cemetery equity unit using aggregator share count until the true economic unit count is verified.
economic_claim.unit_source: Aggregator ~3.46M shares — CONFLICTS with dividend cash math versus FY2024 NI $5.3M [HUMAN REVIEW — do not size on this denominator]
economic_claim.enterprise_to_equity_reconciliation: Nonprofit cemetery: 990 net assets + operations + land gap less illiquidity/governance reserve. Market price $575 is not reconciled until share count is fixed.

component_groups.label: Form 990 net assets (accounting floor)
component_groups.adjustments: Accounting reference only until PDF and share count verified.
component_groups.overlap_control: Unique overlap key form990_net_assets; no other component capitalizes the same claim.

component_groups.label: Cemetery operating franchise
component_groups.adjustments: Dividend claim must reconcile to NI.
component_groups.overlap_control: Unique overlap key cemetery_operations; no other component capitalizes the same claim.

component_groups.label: Land fair-value gap above 990 carrying amounts
component_groups.economic_claim: Land fair-value gap above 990 carrying amounts
component_groups.valuation_basis: Option on land fair value above 990 carrying amounts.
component_groups.overlap_control: Unique overlap key land_market_to_990_gap; no other component capitalizes the same claim.

risk_and_timing.probability_basis: Base assigns modest probability of a material mark-up; high case is appraisal upside.
risk_and_timing.timing_basis: Realization only via control transaction or gradual plot sales; not a dated payoff.
risk_and_timing.remaining_capital_basis: No owner-funded development capital modeled; cemetery ops fund maintenance.

component_groups.label: OTC illiquidity and nonprofit-governance reserve
component_groups.valuation_basis: Reserve for OTC structure, nonprofit constraints, and share-count conflict.
component_groups.overlap_control: Unique overlap key illiquidity_and_governance_reserve; no other component capitalizes the same claim.

wisdom_applied: Klarman: when the unit count is wrong, refuse a precise IRR.
Munger: invert — a $45 dividend on 3.46M shares cannot come from $5.3M NI.
limitations: EVIDENCE BLOCKED for investment IRR until Form 990 PDFs and verified shares outstanding are in PLWN/investor-documents/.
Market price $575 versus provisional NAV band is unexplained without correcting the denominator.

component_valuation_results.decision_rule: Use the complete low/base/high component schedule. Embedded components are estimated but not added twice.

component_review_queue.decision_rule: Each assigned rater records accept, challenge, or reject with a proposed range and evidence. The aggregator may not silently average disputed ranges.

items.label: Form 990 net assets (accounting floor)
mandatory_checks: Is the valuation method appropriate for this economic claim?
Is the security's ownership claim and economic-unit denominator reconciled correctly?
Does the evidence support the low/base/high range and its timing?
Are comparable assets truly like-for-like after production, contract, location, capital, ownership, and realization adjustments?
For an option, are success probability, time to realization, and remaining owner-funded capital explicit?
Is the component additive, or already embedded in another component?
What observation would move the base estimate materially?

items.label: Cemetery operating franchise
mandatory_checks: Is the valuation method appropriate for this economic claim?

Is the component additive, or already embedded in another component?

mandatory_checks: Is the valuation method appropriate for this economic claim?

Is the component additive, or already embedded in another component?
What observation would move the base estimate materially?

valuation_method_route.label: Scarce assets, royalties, and optionality
failure_modes: gross asset value mistaken for shareholder value
operating cash flow and NAV counted twice
remote options treated as contracted cash
valuation_method_route.decision_rule: Use one primary method and no more than two corroborating methods; irrelevant methods and personas remain silent.

method_route.label: Scarce assets, royalties, and optionality
failure_modes: gross asset value mistaken for shareholder value
operating cash flow and NAV counted twice
remote options treated as contracted cash
method_route.decision_rule: Use one primary method and no more than two corroborating methods; irrelevant methods and personas remain silent.

valuation.interpretation: value_per_share is withheld while any material additive component is unpriced; priced_components_per_share is not a complete security value.

scenario_contract.rule: Cases must change cited causal operating, capital, probability, timing, or financing drivers—not only a terminal multiple.

top_value_drivers.label: Land fair-value gap above 990 carrying amounts
top_value_drivers.scenario_assumptions: Option on land mark-up; not double-counted inside form990_net_assets.

top_value_drivers.label: OTC illiquidity and nonprofit-governance reserve
top_value_drivers.scenario_assumptions: Large reserve until share count and dividend cash facts are verified.

top_value_drivers.label: Form 990 net assets (accounting floor)
top_value_drivers.scenario_assumptions: 990 net assets as reference floor for the nonprofit entity, not proven liquidation NAV.

top_value_drivers.label: Cemetery operating franchise
top_value_drivers.scenario_assumptions: Modest capitalization of cemetery cash earnings; land value is separate.

source_lineage.locator: notes: aggregator ~3.46M shares provisional; conflicts with dividend cash math
notes: aggregator ~3.46M shares provisional; conflicts with dividend cash math
notes: aggregator ~3.46M shares provisional; conflicts with dividend cash math

falsifiers: Verified share count or Schedule D shows net assets per economic unit far from this band.
Operations cannot sustain distributions anywhere near the indicated $45.40 dividend under the provisional share count.
Schedule D / appraisal shows no material gap above 990 carrying value.
Verified float and governance show minority common can realize NAV without the haircut.
required_refresh_triggers: new filing or material operating update

change_control.rule: A source fact is locked. Every assumption change requires a reason, author, timestamp, and before/after value.

universal_valuation_contract.decision_rule: No security is decision-grade until every material claim is valued exactly once by a valid calculation proof and every material evidence blocker is resolved.

context_overlay.disclaimer: Context only. Tailwinds inform stance and overlay sizing; they do not auto-inflate Lawrence base IRR. Promotion to base case requires [HUMAN REVIEW].

total_return_panel.error: Vendor events are discovery evidence; primary-source completeness has not been established.
total_return_panel.return_contract: split-adjusted close excluding dividends; event amounts normalized for later splits; cash reinvested at ex-date close; pre-tax nominal
